<!-- What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ Feature
- [ ] 🌿 New scaffold adapter
- [ ] 📚 Documentation

## How was this tested?

<!-- Commands you ran, platforms you tested on. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint`, `bun run typecheck`, and `bun run test` pass locally
- [ ] Changeset added (`bunx changeset`) — or this change is docs/CI/test-only
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/`, `README.md`, `CLAUDE.md`) where behavior changed
- [ ] If workflows/installers were touched: actions SHA-pinned, permissions least-privilege, checksums verified

## Greptile

Every PR must reach a **5/5** Greptile confidence score before merge.
Address every review comment (fix it or reply with reasoning), push, then comment `@greptileai` to trigger a re-review.
